script.text: Ek gaon jahan suraj dhalne ke baad galiyan khaali ho jaati hain.
India ke ek aise gaon ki kahani, jahan suraj dhalte hi mahaul badal jaata hai.
Local log kehte hain ki raat ke baad kuch raaste aise hain jahan jaana mana hai.
Ajeeb baat ye hai ki alag-alag logon ne ek jaisi awaazein aur shadows notice ki. Science ise fear bolta hai, lekin locals ke liye ye aaj bhi ek warning hai.
Aapko kya lagta hai — sach, darr ya coincidence? Comment me batao.

Remote location ki wajah se rescue almost impossible ho gaya.
